ASIN: B001EYUROK Title: ESPN NFL 2K5 - PlayStation 2 (Limited) Rating: 4.0 Review title: Fun Game with problems Review text: First of all, I cannot stress what a wonderful thing to see, an AFFORDABLE video game. This is an absolutely fun game to play against friends. I have played it both on the PS2 and the XBOX and the XBOX version you get moving highlights of the game you are playing, on the PS2 version, Sportscenter does NOT show moving highlights, only pictures. It does show, on both systems, highlights of other games while you are playing a season. This is very nice. The end of game interview is kind of cool although it's limited to what they are going to say. I do like the VIP/Crib mode. You get occasional calls from celebraties and you either get beat or beat them and depends on the level you are playing at, some of the celebraties can be quite crafty. The graffics are not as good as Madden, but the movements are. You also get shots of the fan and one of the cool thing is that if you are playing an away game and are smoking the other team, some of the fans start to leave early. You do have to go through three layers in order to choose a play, which I don't like, but the cool thing is that you have a favorites page and you can add your favorite plays and it adds a somewhat short step. But overall, it's extremely entertaining, better than anything 989 sports can come up with, but haven't quite step up to the level of Madden and they KNOW this. That is why this game is affordable at it's initial $19.99 price. It is worth the price. I haven't played it on-line yet, I am still discovering all the in's and out's of the game. Enjoy it. ASIN: 1616611715 Title: Hey, That's My Fish Rating: 4.0 Review title: My niece and nephew loved this Review text: My family isn't much into games with the exception of rummy and other card games. This means that I usually struggle to get any member of my family to try any of the games I bring with me when we are going to get together.

However, when I described this one my sister was willing to allow her children (8 and 6) to try it. There was a bit of a problem getting my 6 year old niece to understand how things go, and neither of the children did a good job of looking and planning ahead, but both loved the game and immediately wanted to play again.

The game itself is so simple its almost scary. Setup takes only a few minutes and game play is straightforward, with no dice or cards involved. I managed to teach a 6 year old how to play and while the strategy might confuse her, she still had a wonderful time.

Review text: One of the best games I've played in a long time. The graphics are great, the plot is fun, and while it can be challenging, there's nothing you can't figure out with a little thought. The only couple times I got stuck were because I didn't see a particular hot spot. Would recommend to everyone. ASIN: B00005ME8S Title: Half-Life - PlayStation 2 Rating: 5.0 Review title: From a non-1st person shooter fan Review text: Lets start this with "I don't like first person shooters" I have allways found them somewhere between silly and disturbing. I have tried many of them and none made it past an hour or so. With that said: I could not stop playing this game. It had an actual story, albiet a weak one, but a story none the less. The Graphics are good, the controls tight and the load times were not to bad. The training mode is very good and you go into the game with all the skills needed, so you don't spend a half hour dying because you can't control the character.
One thing that it offers that stands it above the rest is the puzzle aspect. Frequently they are obvious, but there are times when you don't really realize you are working them out. That stands out. The game is emersive and flows well, so you don't really "think" about what your doing, you just do it.
If you are a hard core 1st person shooter type player, I don't know what to tell you, but if you are like me and either a casual gamer or have never really liked them, give this one a try. ASIN: B005HH46QK Title: The Book of Unwritten Tales Rating: 5.0 Review title: This is a fun, goofy Review text: This is a fun, goofy, journey puzzle. Love the creature and the banter between them all. Switching play people was a great idea. I will get the next one for sure. ASIN: B00005ME8S Title: Half-Life - PlayStation 2 Rating: 3.0 Review title: Better on the PC Review text: If you've played this game on the PC, I don't recommend playing it on the PS2. Although it looks nice, the controls are so difficult. This isn't a game that should have been brought out for the PS2. The game itself is one of the best, only on a PC though. ASIN: B00005ME8S Title: Half-Life - PlayStation 2 Rating: 1.0 Review title: Do not support Valve or Sierra. While this doesn't apply to the PS2 game because its not multiplayer, just know that if you buy this game you're supporting a couple of irresponsible companies. My two cents.
